description: Candidate sources for real split-mesh humanoid evidence. Every candidate still must pass local source import smoke before it can close product gates.

candidates.whyCandidate: Humanoid adventurer characters with hair, clothing, hats, weapons, shields, and backpacks. Use source import smoke to verify mesh separation.
verificationRequired: Downloaded asset must import with source mesh count > 1.
Rig workflow must preserve rig mesh count > 1.
H-002 evidence must reach deformation score >= 3.

candidates.whyCandidate: Large humanoid character pack already used by current evidence; keep as fallback, but current sampled characters import as single mesh.
verificationRequired: Pick a character variant not already measured.
Downloaded asset must import with source mesh count > 1 before it can be used for the strict gate.
